full_text:
King Wutugu 兀突骨大王
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
King Wutugu (兀突骨大王). Ruled the cave dwelling Wuguo Kingdom in south China. Twelve spans tall. King Wutugu is a fictional character. King Wutugu was affiliated with Nanman. King Wutugu lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
